reference.name: LAF Enterprise ERP Gold
reference.howBuilt: Emitted from the generator templates after hand-coding the real-auth + deployment upgrades INTO those templates, plus 5 governed local-LLM catalog modules.

reproduction.name: LAF Enterprise ERP GoldGenerated
reproduction.howBuilt: Pure deterministic generator run: `--mode erp-gold` (defaults to specs/erp-gold-reference.json). NO local-LLM proposal supplied, so only the deterministic surface is reproduced.

reproductionMetrics.explanation: The entire hand-coded production surface (engine, real PBKDF2 auth, cookie login, role claims, audit, deployment scripts, create UI, double-entry GL, maker/checker, RBAC) lives in the generator templates/spec, so GoldGenerated reproduces it identically (100% of the deterministic surface; 23/23 spec modules; 128 tests). The only Gold-exclusive content is the 5 NON-deterministic local-LLM-proposed catalog modules and their ~10 tests, which a pure deterministic run does not regenerate. Counting those, module reproduction is 23/28 = 82% and test reproduction is 128/138 = 93%.

discipline: Every manual ERP-GOLD action (auth, login, deployment, audit-on-login) was written back into tools/LocalAIFactory.Generator/templates + specs + Program.cs, never left as a one-off product edit. That is what makes the generator able to reproduce the Gold reference.
